title: magnolia × pruhoniciana
intro: Magnolia × pruhoniciana, also known as the Prague magnolia, is a hybrid plant of the magnolia genus, specifically a cross between Magnolia denudata and Magnolia liliiflora. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their various medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Magnolia × pruhoniciana include its ability to reduce stress, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make medicinal preparations such as syrups, salves, and ointments.
